title: Salmon modpack
description: A lightweight modpack designed for an enjoyable multiplayer experience with friends, featuring a curated selection of mods for enhanced gameplay.
body:
# Salmon modpack
This lightweight modpack enhances the Vanilla+ experience with a carefully selected mix of mods. The Create mod adds advanced automation, while MTR with additional EU and London mods introduces immersive transport systems. 'Biomes o'plenty' expands world generation with diverse new biomes and a wide variety of wood types for more creative building. To ensure smooth performance, we've included Sodium, and FerriteCore. Perfect for those who enjoy exploration, automation, and detailed construction with friends!

<details>
<summary>Mods & Shaders</summary>

- 3D Skin Layers
- Additional Redstone
- Adorn
- Advancement Plaques
- AdvancementInfo
- AmbientSounds
- AppleSkin
- Architectury API
- bad packets
- Balm
- Better Beds Reforged
- Better Create Recipes
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Biomes O' Plenty Structures
- BetterF3
- BlueMap
- Botarium
- Chat Heads
- Chunky
- ClickThrough plus
- Cloth Config API
- Collective
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Construction Wand
- Create
- Create builders
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Ore Excavation
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create Track Map
- Create: Bells & Whistles
- Create: Copycats+
- Create: Dynamic Lights

And much more

</details>

## Known Issues
None at the moment as this is a fresh start
